_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting AI impact assessments, including risk tiering, harm identification, bias evaluation, human oversight documentation, and residual risk determination.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AG domain. AG-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-003 (SP, cosine: 0.731), RC-S-004 (RC, cosine: 0.682).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.677). Shared vocabulary: [assessments, impact, risk, skill]. DCWF-only terms [performing] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, bias, conducting, determination, documentation, evaluation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.913 (P=0.953, R=0.876). P exceeds R by 0.077 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Skill in performing impact/risk assessments." and "Skill in conducting AI impact assessments, including risk tiering, harm identifi" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.744 > STS 0.677 (gap +0.068). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [assessments, impact, risk, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 25.0%. Shared tokens: [assessments, impact, risk, skill]. DCWF-only: [performing]. WIDAI-only: [ai, bias, conducting, determination, documentation, evaluation].
